title: WolfTpmSwtpm::connect uses MalformedResponse for invalid host arg
description: In wolftpm-tss/src/connection.rs lines 153 and 155, CString conversion failures (null byte in host or port string) are mapped to Error::MalformedResponse. That variant's doc string says 'TPM response header is malformed (size field is zero or truncated)' — a pre-call argument validation failure has nothing to do with a response header. This will confuse callers reading the error. Map to a dedicated argument-error variant or return a distinct type that communicates 'invalid argument' rather than a response parsing failure.
